REQ-001.title: System Initialization
REQ-001.description: The mock application must initialize successfully without errors.

REQ-002.title: Boundary Condition Validations
REQ-002.description: The application must safely reject negative inputs.

REQ-003.title: Safe State Degradation
REQ-003.description: The application must default to an ISO 26262 safe state if memory throws a critical fault.
